events.name: fal x Sequoia 72-Hour Video Hackathon
events.description: A 72-hour global sprint will bring together creative technologists, filmmakers, developers, and builders to experiment with generative video and AI-native storytelling, featuring workshops, talks, and mentorship from leading industry creators and engineers with substantial token budgets and competitive prizes on the line.
events.descriptionSummary: Creative technologists, filmmakers, and developers will tackle generative video and AI storytelling over 72 hours with mentorship from industry leaders, hands-on workshops, and competitive prizes.

platformEventData.title: fal x Sequoia 72-Hour Video Hackathon
platformEventData.description: {"type":"doc","content":[{"type":"paragraph","content":[{"type":"text","marks":[{"type":"bold"}],"text":"2026 marks a turning point for creative technology."}]},{"type":"paragraph","content":[{"type":"text","text":"Generative video is emerging as a new creative primitive, reshaping how stories are imagined, produced, and shared across film, advertising, education, entertainment, and the internet at large."}]},{"type":"paragraph","content":[{"type":"text","text":"The "},{"type":"text","marks":[{"type":"bold"}],"text":"fal x Sequoia Video Hackathon"},{"type":"text","text":" is a"},{"type":"text","marks":[{"type":"bold"}],"text":" 72-hour"},{"type":"text","text":" global build sprint for creative technologists, filmmakers, developers, designers, and creators pushing the frontier of AI-native storytelling."}]},{"type":"paragraph","content":[{"type":"text","text":"Think Cannes or Sundance for the tinkerers, builders, dreamers, and hackers: a festival-meets-hackathon for people experimenting with new tools, testing frontier models, prototyping strange ideas, and building original video work that would have taken giant teams and budgets to produce before."}]},{"type":"paragraph","content":[{"type":"text","text":"The event will begin with workshops, talks, and partner programming, followed by a 72-hour sprint where participants will create and submit short-form video projects with generous token budgets and competitive prizes."}]},{"type":"paragraph","content":[{"type":"text","text":"Expect leading AI creators, creative engineers, filmmakers, and builders from across the industry. Judges, mentors, speakers, partners, and prize details will be announced soon."}]},{"type":"paragraph","content":[{"type":"text","marks":[{"type":"italic"}],"text":"Note: This event is fully virtual. Space is limited. Maximum team size is four. All participants must apply and be approved to attend."},{"type":"hardBreak"},{"type":"hardBreak"},{"type":"text","marks":[{"type":"italic"}],"text":"Applications for this event will be closing on July 16th. If you or your team would like to participate in this event, please apply by end of day July 15th to be considered for the competition."}]}]}
platformEventData.descriptionSummary: Developers, filmmakers, and creative technologists will sprint for 72 hours to build AI-native video projects with leading industry builders and mentors judging the work. This global hackathon-festival hybrid will showcase frontier generative video experimentation with generous budgets and competitive prizes, attracting creators pushing the boundaries of what's possible with emerging AI storytelling tools.

events.name: The Future of Agentic AI in Healthcare - Abridge x Anthropic x Lightspeed
events.description: Abridge will host a hackathon where you'll build AI agents to solve real clinical workflows across 300+ health systems, working directly with ML scientists, healthcare workers, and clinical engineers from Abridge, Anthropic, and Lightspeed. You'll tackle one of healthcare's hardest problems—automating everything from clinical trial matching to prior authorization—with actual clinician feedback and the chance to ship something production-ready.
events.descriptionSummary: Top ML scientists and clinical engineers from Abridge, Anthropic, and Lightspeed will guide you through building AI agents that tackle real healthcare automation challenges affecting 300+ health systems, from clinical trial matching to prior authorization. You'll get direct feedback from actual clinicians and potentially ship production-ready solutions addressing some of healthcare's most pressing workflow problems.

platformEventData.descriptionSummary: This hackathon will bring together ML scientists, healthcare workers, and clinical engineers to build AI agents tackling real healthcare workflows—from clinical trial matching to prior authorization—with direct mentorship from Abridge, Anthropic, and Lightspeed experts who've deployed these systems across 300+ health systems. Teams will have access to clinical data, rigorous evaluation frameworks, and clinician feedback to ship solutions that could genuinely impact millions of lives.
